subject: docs(claude): replace local Suggested Implementations with glow-props source reference
body:
Hard-copied patterns (~300 lines) were stale the moment they were pasted.
Replaced with a pointer to the glow-props CLAUDE.md as single source of truth.
Added AI Note, Prohibition, and Cross-Project Reference rules to prevent
local pattern copies from being created again.

Tags: docs, claude-md, patterns, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-sync
Semver: patch
